Reasoning
Q1
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
Twelve students are sitting in parallel rows. E, F,
G, H, I and J sit in row 1 while M, N, O, P, Q and R
sit in row 2. Students in row 1 and row 2 face each
other. Students of row 1 face south while
students of row 2 face north.
F sits second to the right of G, who faces O. One
person sits between O and Q, who sits at one of
the extreme ends. F does not sit at any extreme
end. M sits to the immediate right of N, who sits
fifth left to the Q. R sits opposite I, who is not
adjacent to F. I sits immediately right to the H. J
sits second to the right of E but not opposite to P.
How many students sit between M and Q in the
same row?
(A) Three
(B) Four
(C) Five
(D) One
(E) Two
Q2
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
Twelve students are sitting in parallel rows. E, F,
G, H, I and J sit in row 1 while M, N, O, P, Q and R
sit in row 2. Students in row 1 and row 2 face each
other. Students of row 1 face south while
students of row 2 face north.
F sits second to the right of G, who faces O. One
person sits between O and Q, who sits at one of
the extreme ends. F does not sit at any extreme
end. M sits to the immediate right of N, who sits
fifth left to the Q. R sits opposite I, who is not
adjacent to F. I sits immediately right to the H. J
sits second to the right of E but not opposite to P.
Who sits opposite Q?
(A) I
(B) H
(C) F
(D) E
(E) None of these
Q3
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
Twelve students are sitting in parallel rows. E, F,
G, H, I and J sit in row 1 while M, N, O, P, Q and R
sit in row 2. Students in row 1 and row 2 face each
other. Students of row 1 face south while
students of row 2 face north.
F sits second to the right of G, who faces O. One
person sits between O and Q, who sits at one of
the extreme ends. F does not sit at any extreme
end. M sits to the immediate right of N, who sits
fifth left to the Q. R sits opposite I, who is not
adjacent to F. I sits immediately right to the H. J
sits second to the right of E but not opposite to P.
Who sits second to the left of O?
(A) M
(B) R
(C) Q
(D) F
(E) None of these
Q4
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
Twelve students are sitting in parallel rows. E, F,
G, H, I and J sit in row 1 while M, N, O, P, Q and R
sit in row 2. Students in row 1 and row 2 face each
other. Students of row 1 face south while
students of row 2 face north.
 
Parallel Row Seating Arrangement

F sits second to the right of G, who faces O. One
person sits between O and Q, who sits at one of
the extreme ends. F does not sit at any extreme
end. M sits to the immediate right of N, who sits
fifth left to the Q. R sits opposite I, who is not
adjacent to F. I sits immediately right to the H. J
sits second to the right of E but not opposite to P.
Who sits to the immediate left of R ?
(A) Q
(B) G
(C) E
(D) N
(E) O
Q5
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
Twelve students are sitting in parallel rows. E, F,
G, H, I and J sit in row 1 while M, N, O, P, Q and R
sit in row 2. Students in row 1 and row 2 face each
other. Students of row 1 face south while
students of row 2 face north.
F sits second to the right of G, who faces O. One
person sits between O and Q, who sits at one of
the extreme ends. F does not sit at any extreme
end. M sits to the immediate right of N, who sits
fifth left to the Q. R sits opposite I, who is not
adjacent to F. I sits immediately right to the H. J
sits second to the right of E but not opposite to P.
Who sits to the immediate right of I?
(A) E
(B) G
(C) M
(D) O
(E) None of these
Q6
Study the following data carefully and answer
the questions accordingly.
 
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 A, B, C, D and E are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 P, Q, R, S and
T are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-
2. S sits in the middle of the row. The immediate
neighbor of S faces E. E sits three places away
from B. T sits diagonally opposite to B. A faces P.
C and Q does not sit on any of the extreme ends
of the row. D sits right of B.
 
Four of the following five are alike in a certain
way based on their positions in the above
arrangement and so form a group. Which of the
following does not belong to the group ?
(A) C
(B) S
(C) A
(D) P
(E) R
Q7
Study the following data carefully and answer
the questions accordingly.
 
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 A, B, C, D and E are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 P, Q, R, S and
T are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-
2. S sits in the middle of the row. The immediate
neighbor of S faces E. E sits three places away
from B. T sits diagonally opposite to B. A faces P.
C and Q does not sit on any of the extreme ends
of the row. D sits right of B.
 
Which of the following faces R ?
(A) B
(B) A
(C) C
(D) E
(E) None of these
Q8
Study the following data carefully and answer
the questions accordingly.
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 A, B, C, D and E are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 P, Q, R, S and
T are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-
2. S sits in the middle of the row. The immediate

neighbor of S faces E. E sits three places away
from B. T sits diagonally opposite to B. A faces P.
C and Q does not sit on any of the extreme ends
of the row. D sits right of B.
Which of the following people faces the one who
sits just left of T ?
(A) E
(B) None
(C) A
(D) B
(E) None of these
Q9
Study the following data carefully and answer
the questions accordingly.
 
Ten people sit in two-parallel row. Five people in
each row. In row-1 A, B, C, D and E are seated and
all face towards south. In row-2 P, Q, R, S and T
are seated and all face towards the north. People
seated in row-1 face people seated in row-2. S sits
in the middle of the row. The immediate neighbor
of S faces E. E sits three places away from B. T sits
diagonally opposite to B. A faces P. C and Q does
not sit on any of the extreme ends of the row. D
sits right of B.
 
Which of the following sits just left of D ?
(A) None
(B) C
(C) E
(D) A
(E) B
Q10
Study the following data carefully and answer
the questions accordingly.
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 A, B, C, D and E are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 P, Q, R, S and
T are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-
2. S sits in the middle of the row. The immediate
neighbor of S faces E. E sits three places away
from B. T sits diagonally opposite to B. A faces P.
C and Q does not sit on any of the extreme ends
of the row. D sits right of B.
Who among the following persons is/are sitting
at the extreme end of the row ?
(A) P
(B) Q
(C) A
(D) E
(E) D
Q11
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 P, Q, R, S and T are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 A, B, C, D
and E are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-
2. R sits third to the right of T, either R or T sit at
any of the extreme ends of the row. The one who
faces R sits second to the left of E. C sits
immediately left of E. The one who faces C sits
immediately right of S. Q faces A. B does not sit
at any of the extreme ends of the row. Q sits two
places away from P.
How many people are seated between R and T?
(A) Three
(B) None
(C) Two
(D) Four
(E) None of these
Q12
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 P, Q, R, S and T are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 A, B, C, D
and E are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-
2. R sits third to the right of T, either R or T sit at
any of the extreme ends of the row. The one who
faces R sits second to the left of E. C sits
immediately left of E. The one who faces C sits
immediately right of S. Q faces A. B does not sit

at any of the extreme ends of the row. Q sits two
places away from P.
How many people sit to the left of P?
(A) Two
(B) Three
(C) One
(D) Four
(E) None of these
Q13
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 P, Q, R, S and T are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 A, B, C, D
and E are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-
2. R sits third to the right of T, either R or T sit at
any of the extreme ends of the row. The one who
faces R sits second to the left of E. C sits
immediately left of E. The one who faces C sits
immediately right of S. Q faces A. B does not sit
at any of the extreme ends of the row. Q sits two
places away from P.
Who among the following persons is/are sitting
at the extreme end of the row?
(A) B
(B) S
(C) D
(D) R
(E) None of these
Q14
Study the following information carefully and
answer the given questions:
 
Twelve persons are sitting in two parallel rows
containing six persons each in such a way that
there is an equal distance between adjacent
persons. In the Row-1, P, Q, R, S, T and U are
sitting and all of them are facing towards north
direction. In the Row-2, A, B, C, D, E and F are
sitting and all of them are facing towards south
direction. In the given seating arrangement, each
member sitting in a row faces another member of
the other row.
C sits second from any of the end of the row. Two
persons sit between C and F. One of the
immediate neighbour of F faces T. Two persons
sit between T and Q. P sits third to right of U. U
and P does not sit adjacent to T. One of the
immediate neighbour of U faces A. A does not sit
any of the end of the row. C does not face P. R
sits one of the positions to the left of Q. One of
the immediate neighbour of R faces D. Two
persons sit between D and B who sits to the left
of C.
 
How many persons sit between S and T?
(A) One
(B) Two
(C) More than three
(D) Three
(E) None of these
Q15
Study the following information carefully and
answer the given questions:
 
Twelve persons are sitting in two parallel rows
containing six persons each in such a way that
there is an equal distance between adjacent
persons. In the Row-1, P, Q, R, S, T and U are
sitting and all of them are facing towards north
direction. In the Row-2, A, B, C, D, E and F are
sitting and all of them are facing towards south
direction. In the given seating arrangement, each
member sitting in a row faces another member of
the other row.
C sits second from any of the end of the row. Two
persons sit between C and F. One of the
immediate neighbour of F faces T. Two persons
sit between T and Q. P sits third to right of U. U
and P does not sit adjacent to T. One of the
immediate neighbour of U faces A. A does not sit
any of the end of the row. C does not face P. R

sits one of the positions to the left of Q. One of
the immediate neighbour of R faces D. Two
persons sit between D and B who sits to the left
of C.
What is the position of A with respect to B?
(A) Second to the right
(B) Immediate left
(C) Second to the left
(D) Third to the left
(E) None of these
Q16
Study the following information carefully and
answer the given questions:
 
Twelve persons are sitting in two parallel rows
containing six persons each in such a way that
there is an equal distance between adjacent
persons. In the Row-1, P, Q, R, S, T and U are
sitting and all of them are facing towards north
direction. In the Row-2, A, B, C, D, E and F are
sitting and all of them are facing towards south
direction. In the given seating arrangement, each
member sitting in a row faces another member of
the other row.
C sits second from any of the end of the row. Two
persons sit between C and F. One of the
immediate neighbour of F faces T. Two persons
sit between T and Q. P sits third to right of U. U
and P does not sit adjacent to T. One of the
immediate neighbour of U faces A. A does not sit
any of the end of the row. C does not face P. R
sits one of the positions to the left of Q. One of
the immediate neighbour of R faces D. Two
persons sit between D and B who sits to the left
of C.
 
Which of the following pair of persons sit
extreme ends of the row?
(A) P, F
(B) B, T
(C) E, Q
(D) T, A
(E) None of these

(A) E

(C) C
(D) D
(E) None of these
Q18
Study the following information carefully and
answer the given questions:
 
Twelve persons are sitting in two parallel rows

there is an equal distance between adjacent

persons. In the Row-1, P, Q, R, S, T and U are

(A) D
(B) B
(C) A
(D) C
(E) None of these
Q19
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Ten people sit in a two-parallel row. Five people
in each row. In row-1 P, Q, R, S and T are seated
and all face towards south. In row-2 A, B, C, D
and E are seated and all face towards the north.
People seated in row-1 face people seated in row-

faces R sits second to the left of E. C sits
immediately left of E. The one who faces C sits
immediately right of S. Q faces A. B does not sit
at any of the extreme ends of the row. Q sits two
places away from P.
Who sits to the immediate right of E?
(A) None
(B) D
(C) B
(D) A
(E) None of these

Hints & Solutions
Q1
Text Solution:
1. F sits second to the right of G, who faces O.
2. One student sits between O and Q, who sits at
one of the extreme ends.
3. F does not sit at any extreme end.
So, we have one case,
4. M sits immediately to the right of N, who sits
fifth left to the Q.
5. R sits opposite I, who is not adjacent to F.
6. J sits second to the right of E but not opposite
to P.
7. I sits immediately right to the H.
So, we have,
According to the common solution, we can say
that three students sit between M and Q in the
same row.
Thus, the correct answer is option A.

Q14
Text Solution:
From the given conditions, C sits second from
any of the end of the row. From this condition
there are two possibilities. Two persons sit
between C and F. One of immediate neighbour of
F faces T.
Two persons sit between T and Q. P sits third to
right of U. U and P does not sit adjacent to T. One
of the immediate neighbour of U faces A. A does
not sit any of the end of the row. From this
condition case-1 will be eliminated. C does not
face P.
R sits one of the positions to the left of Q. One of
the immediate neighbour of R faces D. Two
persons sit between D and B who sits to the left
of C. The final arrangement is-
Three persons sit between S and T.
